description_long: This sculpture features a life-sized human figure standing atop a tall, multi-tiered stone pedestal. The figure appears to be male, dressed in historical attire, and is positioned with one leg slightly raised on a rock-like base. The pedestal is surrounded by four smaller plinths, each adorned with what appear to be animal or lion head sculptures at the corners. The entire structure sits on a broad, stepped stone platform, giving it a monumental and commemorative appearance. The materials suggest weathered stone and possibly bronze or patinated metal for the decorative elements. The overall design is formal and symmetrical, typical of public monuments found in parks or plazas.
description: A monumental sculpture of a standing human figure on a multi-tiered stone pedestal, surrounded by four animal head ornaments and set on a broad, stepped base.
description_view_0: Front view showing the human figure facing forward, with all four animal head ornaments clearly visible on the corners of the pedestal.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the profile of the human figure and the stepped structure of the pedestal, with two animal heads visible.
description_view_2: Rear view showing the back of the human figure and the symmetrical arrangement of the pedestal and animal heads.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the human figure in profile, similar to view 1 but from the other side, and two animal heads visible.
attribute_subject_matter: standing human figure on a commemorative pedestal with animal head ornaments
attribute_location_context: The sculpture appears to be designed for an outdoor public space, such as a park or urban plaza, based on its monumental base and decorative elements.
